info.title: Atlas API
info.description: Text-to-SQL data analyst agent. Ask natural-language questions about your data and receive structured answers.

post.description: Sends a conversation to the Atlas agent and streams the response as Server-Sent Events using the Vercel AI SDK UI message stream protocol. Each SSE event is a JSON object with a 'type' field: 'text-delta' for incremental text, 'tool-call' for tool invocations, 'tool-result' for tool outputs, 'step-start' for new agent steps, and 'finish' for completion. The response includes an `x-conversation-id` header when conversation persistence is enabled.

200.description: Streaming response. The body is a text/event-stream following the Vercel AI SDK data stream protocol.

x-conversation-id.description: Present when conversation persistence is active and the conversation was successfully created or located.

schema.description: SSE stream using the Vercel AI SDK UI message stream protocol. Each event is a JSON object with a 'type' field (text-delta, tool-call, tool-result, step-start, finish).

400.description: Bad request (malformed JSON, missing datasource, or invalid conversationId)

503.description: Provider unreachable, auth error, or rate limited

post.description: Runs the Atlas agent to completion and returns a structured JSON response with the answer, SQL queries executed, result data, step count, and token usage.

400.description: Bad request (malformed JSON or missing datasource)

503.description: Provider unreachable, auth error, or rate limited

get.description: Returns a paginated list of conversations for the authenticated user. Requires an internal database (DATABASE_URL).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return (1-100, default 20).

get.description: Returns a single conversation with all its messages. Enforces ownership when auth is enabled.

404.description: Conversation not found or not available

delete.description: Permanently deletes a conversation and all its messages.

404.description: Conversation not found or not available

patch.description: Sets the starred status of a conversation.

400.description: Invalid conversation ID or request body

404.description: Conversation not found or not available

get.description: Returns the health status of the Atlas API including checks for datasource connectivity, LLM provider, semantic layer, internal database, explore backend, auth mode, and Slack integration. Returns HTTP 200 for 'ok' or 'degraded' status, and 503 for 'error' status.

200.description: Service is healthy or degraded (some optional components unavailable)

get.description: Returns actions filtered by status. Requires ATLAS_ACTIONS_ENABLED=true and an internal database.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of actions to return (1-100, default 50).

404.description: Actions not available (no internal database or feature disabled)

get.description: Returns a single action. Only returns actions requested by the authenticated user.

post.description: Approves a pending action and triggers execution. Returns the updated action with results. For admin-only approval mode, the requester cannot approve their own action (separation of duties).
Denies a pending action. Optionally provide a reason in the request body. For admin-only approval mode, the requester cannot deny their own action.

400.description: Invalid action ID or request body

get.description: Returns scheduled tasks owned by the authenticated user. Requires ATLAS_SCHEDULER_ENABLED=true and an internal database.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return (1-100, default 20).

404.description: Scheduled tasks not available (no internal database or feature disabled)

post.description: Creates a recurring query task with a cron schedule and delivery channel.

400.description: Invalid request body or cron expression

post.description: Serverless scheduler tick endpoint for Vercel Cron or external cron services. Checks for due tasks and executes them. Requires CRON_SECRET or ATLAS_SCHEDULER_SECRET.

get.description: Returns a scheduled task with its 10 most recent runs.

put.description: Updates a scheduled task. All fields are optional.

400.description: Invalid request body or cron expression

post.description: Triggers an immediate execution of a scheduled task.

get.description: Returns past execution runs for a scheduled task.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of runs to return (1-100, default 20).

post.description: Creates a new user account with email and password. Only available when auth mode is 'managed' (Better Auth).

404.description: Auth routes not enabled (not in managed mode)

post.description: Authenticates a user with email and password. Returns a session token. Only available when auth mode is 'managed'.

get.description: Returns the current session and user info. Requires a valid session cookie or Authorization header.

post.description: Destroys the current session.
Handles Slack slash commands (/atlas). Acks within 3 seconds and processes the query asynchronously. Requires SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET. Request signature is verified.
Handles Slack Events API callbacks including url_verification challenges and thread follow-up messages. Bot messages are ignored to prevent loops.

get.description: Redirects to the Slack OAuth authorization page. Requires SLACK_CLIENT_ID to be configured.

302.description: Redirect to Slack OAuth authorization page

get.description: Handles the OAuth callback from Slack, exchanges the code for a bot token, and saves the installation.

400.description: Invalid or expired state, or missing code

get.description: Returns counts of connections, entities, metrics, glossary terms, and plugins. Requires admin role.
Lists all entity YAML files with summary info. Requires admin role.
Returns the full parsed YAML for a specific entity. Requires admin role.
Lists all metric YAML files grouped by source. Requires admin role.
Returns all glossary files (default and per-source). Requires admin role.
Returns the parsed catalog.yml. Returns an object with a null catalog field if no catalog exists. Requires admin role.
Serves a raw top-level YAML file from the semantic layer (e.g. catalog.yml, glossary.yml). Only .yml files matching the allowed pattern are served. Requires admin role.

get.summary: Get raw YAML file from subdirectory
get.description: Serves a raw YAML file from a semantic layer subdirectory (e.g. entities/orders.yml, metrics/revenue.yml). Only .yml files in entities/ or metrics/ are allowed. Requires admin role.
Aggregate statistics across the semantic layer. Requires admin role.
Lists all registered database connections with type and cached health status. Requires admin role.

post.description: Triggers a live health check for a specific connection. Requires admin role.

get.description: Lists users with pagination, search, and role filtering. Requires admin role and managed auth.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return (1-200, default 50).

get.description: Aggregate user statistics: total count, banned count, and breakdown by role. Requires admin role.

patch.description: Updates a user's role. Cannot change your own role or demote the last admin. Requires admin role.

400.description: Invalid role or cannot change own role

post.description: Bans a user with optional reason and expiration. Requires admin role.
Removes a ban from a user. Requires admin role.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a user. Cannot delete yourself or the last admin. Requires admin role.

400.description: Cannot delete yourself or last admin

post.description: Revokes all sessions for a user (force logout). Requires admin role.

get.description: Returns paginated audit log entries with optional filters. Requires admin role and internal database.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return (1-200, default 50).

get.description: Aggregate audit statistics: total queries, error count, error rate, and queries per day. Requires admin role.
Lists all installed plugins with type, version, and status. Requires admin role.

post.description: Triggers a health check for a specific plugin. Requires admin role.

get.description: Checks if the current user must change their password. Available to any authenticated managed-auth user.

post.description: Changes the current user's password. Available to any authenticated managed-auth user.

400.description: Invalid current password or weak new password

get.description: Returns contextual query suggestions for one or more tables, ordered by score descending.

parameters.name: table
parameters.description: Table name to get suggestions for. Can be repeated for multiple tables.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of suggestions to return (1-50, default 10).

get.description: Returns top suggestions across all tables, ordered by score descending.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of suggestions to return (1-50, default 10).

post.description: Records a click on a suggestion. Fire-and-forget — always returns 204.

get.description: Returns all prompt collections visible to the authenticated user (built-in + org-scoped).
Returns a single prompt collection with its items, ordered by sort_order.
Returns the current user's active sessions. Requires managed auth mode.

delete.description: Revokes one of the current user's sessions. Cannot revoke another user's session.

404.description: Session not found or not available

get.description: Returns all entities defined in the semantic layer YAML files on disk. Provides a summary view (table, description, counts, type) without internal fields.
Returns the full parsed YAML content for a single entity by name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Entity name (e.g. table name from the YAML file)

entity.description: Parsed YAML entity content (dimensions, measures, joins, query_patterns)

get.description: Returns a simplified view of semantic layer entities with column details, enabling SDK consumers to discover queryable tables.

post.description: Runs the full validation pipeline (empty check, regex guard, AST parse, table whitelist) on a SQL string and returns structured results. Does NOT execute the query.

connectionId.description: Optional connection ID to validate against

tables.description: Tables referenced in the query (populated when valid)

get.description: Returns a shared conversation by its share token. No authentication required for public shares; org-scoped shares require auth.
Returns whether a conversation is currently shared and the share details.

404.description: Conversation not found or not available

post.description: Generates a share link for a conversation. Optionally set expiry and share mode.

400.description: Invalid conversation ID or share options

404.description: Conversation not found or not available

delete.description: Revokes the share link for a conversation, making it inaccessible.

404.description: Conversation not found or not available

get.description: Serves a self-contained HTML page for iframe embedding. Renders the @useatlas/react AtlasChat component.

parameters.name: apiUrl
parameters.description: Atlas API base URL (http or https)

parameters.name: logo
parameters.description: HTTPS URL to custom logo image

parameters.name: initialQuery
parameters.description: Auto-send this query on first open

get.description: Serves the self-contained ESM bundle (React + AtlasChat) for the widget iframe.
Serves the pre-compiled Tailwind CSS for widget components.
Returns an IIFE that injects a floating chat bubble and iframe overlay into any host page. Read data-* attributes from the script tag for configuration.
Returns TypeScript ambient declarations for window.Atlas. Fallback for embedders who load only the script tag without installing @useatlas/react.
Returns a paginated, filterable list of learned query patterns. Admin only.
Returns a single learned pattern by ID. Admin only.

patch.description: Updates a learned pattern's description and/or status. Admin only.

400.description: No recognized fields or invalid status

delete.description: Permanently deletes a learned pattern. Admin only.

post.description: Updates the status of multiple learned patterns at once (max 100). Admin only.

get.description: Returns a paginated, filterable list of query suggestions. Admin only.

delete.description: Permanently prunes a query suggestion. Admin only.

get.description: Returns all prompt collections for the admin view. Admin only.

post.description: Creates a new prompt collection. Admin only.

patch.description: Updates a prompt collection's name, industry, or description. Built-in collections cannot be modified. Admin only.

delete.description: Deletes a prompt collection and cascades to items. Built-in collections cannot be deleted. Admin only.

post.description: Adds a new item to a prompt collection. Built-in collections cannot be modified. Admin only.

patch.description: Updates a prompt item's question, description, or category. Admin only.

delete.description: Deletes a prompt item from a collection. Admin only.

put.description: Reorders items within a prompt collection. Provide all item IDs in the desired order. Admin only.

itemIds.description: All item IDs in desired sort order

get.description: Returns all organizations with member counts. Admin only.
Returns organization details including members and pending invitations. Admin only.
Returns aggregate statistics for an organization (members, conversations, queries). Admin only.

bearerAuth.description: API key or JWT token. Pass via Authorization: Bearer <token>.

tags.name: Chat
tags.description: Streaming chat with the Atlas agent

tags.name: Scheduled Tasks
tags.description: Recurring query tasks with cron scheduling (requires ATLAS_SCHEDULER_ENABLED=true)

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Authentication routes (managed auth via Better Auth)

tags.name: Tables
tags.description: Table discovery from the semantic layer

tags.name: Shared Conversations
tags.description: Public shared conversation access (no auth required)

tags.name: Admin Learned Patterns
tags.description: Admin CRUD for learned query patterns

tags.name: Admin Prompts
tags.description: Admin CRUD for prompt collections and items
